mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, WORD_STUDY_CREATE_AT AS wordStudyCreateAt, WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT AS wordStudyUpdateAt, WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED AS wordStudyIsCompleted, EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AS eduWordMapId, USER_ID AS userId FROM TBL_WORD_STUDY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND EDU_WORD_MAP_ID = #{eduWordMapId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_WORD_STUDY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_WORD_STUDY ( ID, WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED, EDU_WORD_MAP_ID, USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{wordStudyIsCompleted}, #{eduWordMapId}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WORD_STUDY WS JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP EWM ON WS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID = EWM.ID WHERE WS.USER_ID = #{userId} AND EWM.EDU_ID = #{eduId} AND WS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1
